name: ai-writing-suite
description: Suite of writing-assistant skills for professional and product communication. Polish and de-AI prose, learn an author's voice, answer KB questions, and draft from a knowledge base.

interface.shortDescription: Polish/de-AI prose, learn an author's voice, KB-guided writing.
interface.longDescription: A suite of writing-assistant skills: polish and de-AI prose while preserving meaning and voice, learn an author's historical voice into a reusable profile, answer questions from a pluggable knowledge base, and draft new pages against it.
